params.name: Mud Leaf Bud
params.description: The sprouting sapling carries the hope of HP, symbolizing the harmonious coexistence between humanity and nature, reminding us to cherish and protect the environment we depend on for survival. To Creation a fresher, healthier world for future generations, let us together guard our green home.
